abilities.description: You may cast any number of spells from among cards exiled with CARDNAME with total mana value X or less without paying their mana costs.

effect.description: You may cast any number of spells from among cards exiled with CARDNAME with total mana value X or less without paying their mana costs.
effect.name: Play

triggers.description: Whenever a player casts an instant or sorcery spell, exile it instead of putting it into a graveyard as it resolves.
